author: Open Source Contributor
message:
fix: replace broken flexbox-vs-grid link with MDN reference

The Web Dev Simplified blog post returned 404. Replaced it with the
MDN guide on the relationship between Grid and other layout methods,
which covers the same educational content.

Closes microsoft/Web-Dev-For-Beginners#1791
